info.name: Phase 6 — Final Package Delivery (Redesigned)
info.description:
Phase 6 Final Package Delivery API — Per-Video Metadata + Independent Track Rejection.

── WORKFLOW ──────────────────────────────────────────
1. Agency submits package (videos + per-video metadata + thumbnails)
2. MEDICAL_REVIEW — two PARALLEL tracks:
   Track 1 (Video):    Medical Affairs reviews all video files
   Track 2 (Metadata): Brand reviews title/description/tags + selects 1 thumbnail per video
3. Both tracks APPROVED → BRAND_REVIEW
4. Brand reviews full video quality at BRAND_REVIEW → APPROVER_REVIEW
5. Content Approver final sign-off → APPROVED

── REJECTION RULES ───────────────────────────────────
• Medical rejects video track  → only videos go back (metadata stays locked)
• Brand rejects metadata track → only metadata goes back (videos stay locked)
• Brand rejects at BRAND_REVIEW → back to MEDICAL_REVIEW (videos only)
• Approver rejects             → both tracks reset, back to MEDICAL_REVIEW
• At least 1 item must have a comment to reject

── COLLECTION VARIABLES ──────────────────────────────
Auto-saved by Tests scripts:
  baseUrl        → http://164.52.204.34:5001
  adminToken     → saved by 0.1
  medicalToken   → saved by 0.2
  brandToken     → saved by 0.3
  agencyToken    → saved by 0.4
  approverToken  → saved by 0.5
  packageId      → saved by 1.1 Submit Package
  longAssetId    → saved by 1.1 Submit Package
  shortAssetId   → saved by 1.1 Submit Package
  longThumb1Id   → saved by 1.1 Submit Package
  longThumb2Id   → saved by 1.1 Submit Package
  shortThumbId   → saved by 1.1 Submit Package

Set manually before running:
  scriptId       → a LOCKED script ID in FINAL_PACKAGE_STAGE

request.description: Login as Super Admin. Tests script auto-saves → {{adminToken}}
Login as Medical Affairs. Tests script auto-saves → {{medicalToken}}
Login as Content Brand. Tests script auto-saves → {{brandToken}}
Login as Agency POC. Tests script auto-saves → {{agencyToken}}
Login as Content Approver. Tests script auto-saves → {{approverToken}}

Get a presigned S3 upload URL for a video file.
assetType: 'video' or 'thumbnail'

Returns: { uploadUrl, fileUrl, key }
- Use uploadUrl to PUT the file directly to S3/MinIO
- Use fileUrl in the Submit Package request

Get a presigned S3 upload URL for a thumbnail image.
Call this once per thumbnail option you want to upload.

exec: // Save asset IDs and thumbnail IDs from currentAssets

request.description:
Agency submits a new package.

Rules:
- Exactly 1 LONG_FORM video required
- At least 1 SHORT_FORM video required
- Each video must have at least 1 thumbnail
- Each video has its own title, description, tags
- packageId, longAssetId, shortAssetId, thumb IDs auto-saved by Tests script

On success: status = MEDICAL_REVIEW, videoTrackStatus = PENDING, metadataTrackStatus = PENDING

Agency withdraws package back to DRAFT.
Only allowed while status = DRAFT or before review starts.
Agency can then re-submit with corrections.

Medical Affairs approves the video track at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

Effect:
- videoTrackStatus → APPROVED
- If metadataTrackStatus is also APPROVED → status advances to BRAND_REVIEW
- Otherwise status stays at MEDICAL_REVIEW (waiting for Brand to approve metadata)

Medical Affairs rejects the VIDEO TRACK at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

Rules:
- At least 1 item in itemFeedback must have a comment
- field options: VIDEO | TITLE | DESCRIPTION | TAGS | THUMBNAIL
- Medical can only comment on VIDEO field (they don't review metadata)

Effect:
- videoTrackStatus → REJECTED
- metadataTrackStatus stays unchanged (PENDING)
- status stays MEDICAL_REVIEW
- Agency must call resubmit-videos to fix and resubmit

item.name: 2.3 Brand Approves Metadata Track (+ selects thumbnails)

request.description:
Brand approves the METADATA TRACK at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

MUST include thumbnailSelections:
- One entry per video asset
- thumbnailId must belong to that specific assetId
- This is Brand selecting which thumbnail to use for each video

Effect:
- metadataTrackStatus → APPROVED
- Selected thumbnails marked isSelected = true
- If videoTrackStatus is also APPROVED → status advances to BRAND_REVIEW
- Otherwise status stays MEDICAL_REVIEW (waiting for Medical to approve videos)

Brand rejects the METADATA TRACK at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

Brand can comment on: TITLE | DESCRIPTION | TAGS | THUMBNAIL
Can also reference specific thumbnailId for THUMBNAIL feedback.

Effect:
- metadataTrackStatus → REJECTED
- videoTrackStatus stays unchanged
- status stays MEDICAL_REVIEW
- Agency must call resubmit-metadata to fix and resubmit

item.name: 3.1 Resubmit Videos Only (after video track rejected)

exec: console.log('Asset IDs updated after video resubmission');

request.description:
Agency submits new video files after VIDEO TRACK was rejected.

Do NOT send metadata here — title/description/tags/thumbnails are
automatically copied from the previous approved/locked version.

Rules:
- Exactly 1 LONG_FORM required
- At least 1 SHORT_FORM required
- No thumbnails in this request

Effect:
- videoTrackStatus → PENDING
- version increments
- New asset IDs auto-updated by Tests script

item.name: 3.2 Resubmit Metadata Only (after metadata track rejected)

exec: console.log('Asset IDs updated after metadata resubmission');

request.description:
Agency submits corrected metadata after METADATA TRACK was rejected.

Do NOT send video files here — they are automatically copied
from the previous version.

Each entry in videoMetadata is matched by 'order' to the existing video.
New thumbnails must be provided (fresh uploads).

Effect:
- metadataTrackStatus → PENDING
- version increments
- New asset IDs auto-updated by Tests script

Brand approves the full package at BRAND_REVIEW stage.
No thumbnailSelections needed here — that was done at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

Effect: status → APPROVER_REVIEW

item.name: 4.2 Brand Rejects at BRAND_REVIEW (→ back to MEDICAL_REVIEW)

request.description:
Brand rejects at BRAND_REVIEW.

Effect (Option A — confirmed):
- status → MEDICAL_REVIEW (goes BACK)
- videoTrackStatus → REJECTED
- metadataTrackStatus stays APPROVED (metadata stays locked)

Agency must resubmit-videos only.
Medical must re-approve video track.
Then package returns to BRAND_REVIEW.

Content Approver gives final approval.

Effect:
- status → APPROVED
- Package is now locked
- Every video has exactly 1 selected thumbnail

Content Approver rejects at APPROVER_REVIEW.

Effect:
- status → MEDICAL_REVIEW
- videoTrackStatus → REJECTED
- metadataTrackStatus → REJECTED
- Both tracks reset — Agency must resubmit both videos AND metadata

Get full package details including:
- currentAssets (each with thumbnails nested)
- reviews (with itemFeedback)
- status, videoTrackStatus, metadataTrackStatus
- version, name, language
Get the active package for a given script.

Get all versions of this package.
Shows how videos and metadata changed across resubmissions.

Get packages in your review queue.
Role-filtered:
- MEDICAL_AFFAIRS → packages where videoTrackStatus = PENDING at MEDICAL_REVIEW
- CONTENT_BRAND   → packages where metadataTrackStatus = PENDING at MEDICAL_REVIEW + all BRAND_REVIEW packages
- CONTENT_APPROVER → APPROVER_REVIEW packages
- AGENCY_POC      → their submitted packages

Get packages you have previously reviewed.
decision = APPROVED or REJECTED
Get overall package statistics (counts by status).
